expected_path_note: SC1=Y (CEO, senior exec of SIAP-relevant business) -> set_flag -> final=N -> siap
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 02 – CEO Of Contractor Serving Myanmar Ministry No Ownership
activities: Daniel Oh is the Chief Executive Officer of Ayeyar BuildCorp Ltd, a contractor whose order book consists mainly of government building projects for Myanmar's national administration in Naypyidaw, including ministry office complexes and a military housing estate; company filings attribute roughly 65% of revenues to these contracts. Mr Oh holds no shares in the company; his remuneration is a salary plus bonus. He continues to lead the company today.
origin_of_assets: Salary and bonuses from his executive career in construction.
